requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline — BNM / ORE Requirement

summary.en: BNM (Bureau des Normes de Madagascar) adopts IEC standards as the basis for technical conformity in Madagascar, and IEC 61851 is the applicable international baseline for conductive EV supply equipment. IEC 61851-1 covers general requirements including control pilot behaviour, protective earthing, isolation monitoring, interlocks, overcurrent and over-temperature protection, and emergency stop provisions where applicable. IEC 61851-23:2023 (second edition) addresses DC EV charging stations. ORE coordinates regulatory approval for grid-connected electrical installations and may reference BNM-adopted IEC standards as part of project approval. Documentation language for regulatory submissions in Madagascar is French (Francophone administrative context). Given Madagascar's tropical climate (high humidity, heat, and salt-laden coastal air in port areas), IP65 enclosure protection for outdoor AC chargers and IP54 for DC units are the applicable IEC 60529 minimum benchmarks for outdoor deployments.
summary.zh: 马达加斯加BNM（标准局）以IEC标准为技术合格评定基础，IEC 61851是传导式电动汽车供电设备的适用国际基线。IEC 61851-1涵盖通用要求，包括控制导引行为、保护接地、绝缘监测、互锁、过流及过温保护，以及适用时的急停措施。IEC 61851-23:2023（第二版）适用于直流电动汽车充电站。ORE协调并网电气安装的监管批准，可在项目审批中引用BNM采纳的IEC标准。马达加斯加向监管机构提交的文件语言为法语（法语区行政背景）。鉴于马达加斯加热带气候（港口地区高湿度、高温及含盐海洋空气），室外交流充电桩须达到IP65防护等级、直流充电桩须达到IP54——这是IEC 60529对室外部署的最低适用基准。
summary.zht: 馬達加斯加BNM（標準局）以IEC標準為技術合格評定基礎，IEC 61851是傳導式電動汽車供電設備的適用國際基線。IEC 61851-1涵蓋通用要求，包括控制導引行為、保護接地、絕緣監測、互鎖、過流及過溫保護，以及適用時的急停措施。IEC 61851-23:2023（第二版）適用於直流電動汽車充電站。ORE協調併網電氣安裝的監管批准，可在項目審批中引用BNM採納的IEC標準。馬達加斯加向監管機構提交的文件語言為法語（法語區行政背景）。鑑於馬達加斯加熱帶氣候（港口地區高濕度、高溫及含鹽海洋空氣），室外交流充電樁須達到IP65防護等級、直流充電樁須達到IP54——這是IEC 60529對室外部署的最低適用基準。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment (second edition)
IEC 61851-24 — Digital communication between a DC EV charging station and an EV for control of DC charging
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code) — IP65 for outdoor AC, IP54 for DC
BNM (Bureau des Normes de Madagascar) — IEC standards adoption
ORE (Office de Régulation de l'Electricité) — regulatory project approval requirements

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements, in force April 2024), which corresponds structurally to IEC 61851-1 but incorporates China-specific connector, signaling, and communication requirements. GB/T 18487.1-2023 test evidence is useful as a design starting-point reference but does not substitute for IEC 61851-accredited test reports accepted by BNM, ORE, the project owner, or a Madagascar conformity assessment route. French-language documentation may be required for ORE submissions; Chinese-language or English-only documentation may not be accepted without translation.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023（电动汽车传导充电系统第1部分：通用要求，2024年4月生效），其结构上对应IEC 61851-1，但包含中国特有的接口、信号及通信要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023测试证据可作为设计起点参考，但不能替代BNM、ORE、项目业主或马达加斯加合格评定路径所认可的IEC 61851认可实验室测试报告。ORE文件提交可能要求法语文件；仅提供中文或英文文件可能无法被接受，须进行翻译。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023（電動汽車傳導充電系統第1部分：通用要求，2024年4月生效），其結構上對應IEC 61851-1，但包含中國特有的接口、信號及通訊要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023測試證據可作為設計起點參考，但不能替代BNM、ORE、項目業主或馬達加斯加合格評定路徑所認可的IEC 61851認可實驗室測試報告。ORE文件提交可能要求法語文件；僅提供中文或英文文件可能無法被接受，須進行翻譯。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements (in force April 2024)

gap.en: Exporters should prepare: an IEC 61851-1 clause matrix; accredited IEC safety test reports from an ILAC-recognised laboratory; DC-station IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC products; IP65 / IP54 / IK10 test certificates for outdoor enclosures; protective device ratings; thermal derating evidence for Madagascar's tropical ambient conditions (high heat and humidity); installation instructions aligned with ORE project requirements in French; and corrosion-resistance evidence for coastal or high-humidity deployment locations. A standalone GB/T 18487 test report is not accepted as IEC 61851 compliance evidence without a clause-level gap assessment. French-language regulatory documentation is required for ORE submissions.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备：IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵；ILAC认可实验室出具的IEC安全测试报告；直流产品的IEC 61851-23证据；室外箱体的IP65 / IP54 / IK10测试证书；保护器件额定值；适配马达加斯加热带环境条件（高温高湿）的热降额证据；符合ORE项目要求的法语安装说明；以及沿海或高湿度部署地点的耐腐蚀证据。单独的GB/T 18487测试报告在未完成逐条差距评估的情况下不被视为IEC 61851合规证据。ORE文件提交须使用法语监管文件。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備：IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣；ILAC認可實驗室出具的IEC安全測試報告；直流產品的IEC 61851-23證據；室外箱體的IP65 / IP54 / IK10測試證書；保護器件額定值；適配馬達加斯加熱帶環境條件（高溫高濕）的熱降額證據；符合ORE項目要求的法語安裝說明；以及沿海或高濕度部署地點的耐腐蝕證據。單獨的GB/T 18487測試報告在未完成逐條差距評估的情況下不被視為IEC 61851合規證據。ORE文件提交須使用法語監管文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — BNM adopts IEC 61851 as the applicable safety baseline; ORE references IEC standards in project approval; IP65 / IP54 enclosure protection is required for outdoor deployment in Madagascar's tropical climate; French-language documentation required for regulatory submissions
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and certification; it is not accepted as direct IEC 61851 evidence in Madagascar without additional accredited testing; Chinese-language documentation alone is insufficient for ORE

source.publisher: ORE — Office de Régulation de l'Electricité, Madagascar

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487.1-2023 as a design starting point only. Madagascar-facing EVSE documentation must include IEC 61851-1 accredited evidence, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC stations, IP-rated enclosure certificates for tropical conditions, thermal review for high-humidity and high-heat environments, and French-language regulatory submissions for ORE.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487.1-2023作为设计起点。面向马达加斯加的EVSE文件必须包括IEC 61851-1认可证据、直流充电站的IEC 61851-23证据、适用于热带条件的IP防护等级认证书、针对高湿度和高温环境的热环境审查，以及向ORE提交的法语监管文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487.1-2023作為設計起點。面向馬達加斯加的EVSE文件必須包括IEC 61851-1認可證據、直流充電站的IEC 61851-23證據、適用於熱帶條件的IP防護等級認證書、針對高濕度和高溫環境的熱環境審查，以及向ORE提交的法語監管文件。
